events.description: Middle East Rail is the region's largest rail exhibition and conference. It brings together rail operators and government to source solutions, buy equipment, and address the challenges in the industry. Join us in Dubai 9 - 10 June 2026.

events.title: Regenerative Medicine ASRM Congress 2026
events.description: The 4th Annual Regenerative Medicine ASRM Congress — the region's premier platform for advancing cellular therapy and regenerative solutions. Accredited for 40 CME hours.

events.title: Dubai FinTech Summit 2026
events.description: A premier global gathering organized by DIFC bringing together financial leaders, investors, and innovators. 300+ global experts across four stages, 200+ exhibitors, and the FinTech World Cup grand finale. events.title: Capital Market Summit 2026
events.description: Platform for individuals and businesses from Dubai's IPO ecosystem and capital market. Topics include investing in the age of influence, South-South corridors connecting MENA/Asia/Africa, 24/7 trading frontier, private credit and alternatives, unlocking liquidity across emerging markets, the future of data in financial markets, and family offices as global allocators.

events.description: The world's largest startup and investor connector event, bringing together founders, investors, and visionaries globally. Features Startup X Labs, Content Nation X, DigiHealth-Biotech, and the Supernova Challenge 2.0 pitch competition with $214,000 prize fund. Core themes: Founder Restructure, New Capital Stack, Commercial Deeptech, Scaleup Advantage & Emerging Markets.
